No dot here is the start
The equilibrium requires solving zero equals rP times one minus P over K minus h
With constant K the equation becomes a quadratic to find P_e
When K drops linearly the balance shifts until P_e hits zero
The time when sustainability fails occurs when K equals the minimum harvest plus growth terms
A palindrome appears here: noon
The population vanishes when the environment can no longer support the loss
No dot here is the end
